note: Default tone for personal-assistant drafts; overridden by per-recipient tone-history match.
Always use the user's local timezone for new scheduling.
Hard rule — no meetings booked during these windows. Override requires explicit user confirmation.
Protected for deep work. Schedulers should AVOID booking here unless emergency.
Hard rule — do not initiate work communications after this time. Drafts queued for next morning.
Never reveal these topics to anyone other than the user. Decline politely without explanation.
Shareable with the user's manager. Other private topics still off-limits.
Email send is review-required by default; autonomous only for marked-trusted threads.
Tentative-hold autonomous; sending invites requires review.
User's known standing meetings — pre-populate, don't suggest conflicts.
Team members allowed to act on user's behalf for which categories. Empty default; configure per user.
Always CC certain people on certain categories of thread (e.g. customer conversations CC manager).

default.meeting_conflict: Apologies, I have a conflict at that time. Could we try {alt_time}?
default.scope_creep: Thanks for the suggestion. To stay focused on the core deliverable, I'd like to defer this to a separate workstream.

note: Reusable decline templates for common scenarios.
Drafts in this language unless recipient prefers another (per recipient-history).
